tagline: Define Google Forms as code. Diff, review, deploy.
one_sentence_purpose: Infrastructure as Code for Google Forms with output integrations to Google Sheets, email, and webhooks
target_users: DevOps engineers and developers who want version-controlled, repeatable Google Forms deployments
visual_metaphors: form fields arranged on a circuit board grid
code editor window transforming into a form layout
pipeline flow from TypeScript definition to deployed form
